meaning: n.储备(物),储藏量,预备队vt.储备,保存,保留,预定,预约
examples: I'll reserve a table for five.
You can reserve seats over the telephone.
The Federal Reserve lowered interest rates by half a point.
On the asset side, one of the portfolios is the funded reserve for grants.
And reserve team midfielder Vincent Weijl has completed a transfer to Spanish side SD Eibar.
